headline: How Much Do you Need To Invest to Make $100k On Dividends Right Now?
summary: Let’s cut through the noise on this dividend dream that keeps investors up at night. The key question many investors have is how much cash do you need parked in a portfolio to crank out $100,000 in annual dividend income right now, as of March 2026? The reality is that it all boils down to one ... How Much Do you Need To Invest to Make $100k On Dividends Right Now?

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
summary: The Dividend Kings outperformed SPY year-to-date, up 2.06% versus SPY's 3.06% loss, despite a March pullback. Check out the list here.

headline: Procter And Gamble Expands Bevel Into Men’s Body Care Segment
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has expanded its BEVEL brand into men's body care with the launch of its first body cream. The new product focuses on hydration and skin comfort, with a formulation developed for Black men and their specific concerns around dryness and irritation. This marks BEVEL's move beyond grooming into men's skincare and broadens P&G's reach in the men's personal care category. For investors tracking NYSE:PG, this launch sits within P&G's broader consumer products portfolio,...
